overall.description: First-person exploration of the Hospital Wing in Hogwarts Legacy, ascending from a mechanical sub-level through grand stone corridors into a sunlit gothic infirmary, briefly visiting a private side room, then exiting past a unicorn statue and descending a spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: mechanical sub-level with gear machinery transitioning to stone corridor

events.description: ascends wooden stairs and enters the stone column corridor from the mechanical area
lighting shifts from artificial dim to natural light streaming through tall windows

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs from a mechanical room with large gears, then walking forward through a stone corridor

entered.detail: massive bronze-colored gear machinery visible in the dimly lit starting area
steep wooden stairs with metal railings ascending from the mechanical room
long corridor with stone walls and repeating columns extending into the distance
tall stone pillars lining both sides of the corridor
large arched windows with stone tracery allowing bright light to enter

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit mechanical area with large gears, then ascends a wooden staircase into a bright stone corridor lined with tall gothic windows and columns. The lighting transitions from artificial to natural as the camera moves from the enclosed machinery room into the sunlit hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone corridor leading to Hospital Wing entrance

events.description: text overlay 'Hospital Wing' appears in the lower left corner
approaches and passes through the large decorative archway into the Hospital Wing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor toward the Hospital Wing entrance archway

entered.detail: ornate stone archway with carved details marking the entrance to the Hospital Wing
iron-frame hospital beds with white sheets visible through the archway
teal privacy curtains hanging around the hospital beds

segments.scene_description: Walking through the grand stone corridor with tall windows casting striped shadows on the floor. The 'Hospital Wing' text appears as the camera approaches the ornate archway entrance, with glimpses of hospital beds and blue curtains becoming visible through the opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hospital Wing main hall with private side room

events.description: enters the main Hospital Wing hall with high vaulted ceilings and hospital beds
turns right and enters a small private side room with desk and bed
exits the side room and returns to the main hospital hall

agents.ego_description: entering the Hospital Wing main hall, then briefly exploring a private side room with wooden furniture before returning to the main space

entered.detail: ornate blue patterned rug on the marble floor at the room entrance
heavy wooden door with iron handle leading to the private side room
antique wooden writing desk with books and papers in the side room
wooden bed frame with blue bedding in the private room
gold-framed portraits hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: Entering the spacious Hospital Wing with high vaulted ceilings and rows of beds with blue privacy curtains. The camera briefly detours into a private side room containing a wooden desk, bed, and framed portraits, then returns to the main hall with its marble floors and gothic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hospital Wing main hall with seating area and medical cabinets

events.description: an NPC in blue robes walks across the far end of the hall

agents.ego_description: exploring the Hospital Wing interior, panning to view the seating area, medical cabinets, and architectural details including the chandelier

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue robes walking slowly across the far end of the hall near the exit

entered.detail: octagonal wooden table with tea set in the center seating area
green upholstered armchairs arranged around the central table
tall dark wood storage cabinets against the walls
iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
large potted plants in blue and white ceramic pots

segments.scene_description: Exploring the expansive Hospital Wing with its marble floors and tall gothic windows. The camera pans across a central seating area with armchairs and a round table, then views medical cabinets and a chandelier. An NPC in blue robes walks across the far end of the hall as the camera approaches the exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit corridor with unicorn statue and spiral staircase

events.description: exits the Hospital Wing through the archway into a side corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the Hospital Wing, passing a bronze unicorn statue, and descending a narrow spiral staircase with wooden steps

entered.detail: green-patinated bronze statue of a unicorn in a wall niche with plants
narrow winding staircase with wooden steps and stone walls
lit wall-mounted lanterns illuminating the stairwell
small circular landing room with wooden statue and circular rug
bronze statue of a figure with hat on a pedestal in the circular room

segments.scene_description: Exiting the Hospital Wing through the stone archway into a narrower corridor featuring a prominent bronze unicorn statue in a wall niche. The camera then enters and descends a dimly lit spiral staircase with wooden steps, passing wall lanterns and a small circular landing room containing a wooden statue before continuing downward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a dimly lit mechanical underbelly into a grand, sunlit gothic infirmary before descending back into the shadows of a spiral staircase. It begins amidst large gears in a dark machinery room, climbing a wooden staircase as the lighting shifts from artificial gloom to the natural brightness of a stone corridor lined with tall windows. As the camera passes through an ornate archway, the scene expands into the spacious Hospital Wing, briefly detouring into a private room with a wooden desk and portraits before returning to the main hall's marble floors and vaulted ceilings. The view then pans across a central seating area and medical cabinets, catching sight of a robed figure in the distance before moving toward the exit. Finally, the camera passes a bronze unicorn statue in a wall niche and enters a dimly lit spiral staircase, descending past wall lanterns and a small landing room containing a wooden statue.
